hero.title: Translate your documents in minutes
hero.subtitle: Upload a PDF — get a translated document. For visas, banks, universities, immigration.

howItWorks.label: THE PROCESS
howItWorks.title: Three steps to your translation
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select any scanned document — passport, diploma, bank statement, or more. Up to 50 pages, 25 MB.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI reads the document, preserves names and numbers, and produces an accurate translation in minutes.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a clean, formatted document with a disclaimer on every page. Ready to share or attach to your application.

documents.label: WHAT WE TRANSLATE
documents.title: All document types
documents.subtitle: Used in immigration, education, banking, and legal contexts

trust.label: WHY WPO TRANSLATIONS
trust.title: Built for people navigating bureaucracy abroad
trust.speedDesc: Most documents are translated in under 5 minutes. Traditional bureaus take days.
trust.priceDesc: From $4.39 per document vs $25–40 at a translation bureau.
trust.tonDesc: Pay securely with TON cryptocurrency. No bank card required.
trust.securityDesc: Your documents are stored securely and permanently deleted after 30 days.
trust.informalDesc: Our translations are for informational use. Not certified or notarized.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Is this translation accepted by consulates or universities?
faq.a1: Our translations are for informational use only. They are not certified or notarized. Always check with your institution whether an unofficial translation is sufficient.
faq.a2: Most documents are translated in 2–5 minutes. Complex or long documents may take up to 10 minutes.
faq.a3: We support Russian, English, Thai, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, German, French, Spanish, and Arabic as target languages.
faq.a4: We accept TON cryptocurrency via Tonkeeper wallet. No bank card required.
faq.a5: Your files are encrypted in transit and at rest. They are permanently deleted after 30 days.
